rag_rules: Fix function call argument count to match defined signature in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, implementation bindings in implementation scopes
Ensure AGREE type declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents or ports in component type annexes
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
